title: Bank Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Bank branch audit by CA firm. RBI panel auditor. Statutory audit, revenue audit, IS audit for banks. Cooperative & scheduled banks.
bodyText:
HEADING1:Bank Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor

What is Bank Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Bank branch audit by CA firm. RBI panel auditor. Statutory audit, revenue audit, IS audit for banks. Cooperative & scheduled banks.
Virtual Auditor provides professional bank audit services india | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?
• Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) with 14+ years experience
• IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333)
• Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
• Associate Company Secretary (ACS)
• Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai
• 100+ complex valuations completed
HEADING2:Our Approach
We combine deep regulatory expertise with AI-powered tools to deliver accurate, defensible, and timely results. Every engagement is led by CA V. Viswanathan, ensuring senior-level attention.
HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Virtual Auditor conducts audits in compliance with the Standards on Auditing (SAs) issued by ICAI and applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. Our audit methodology combines risk-based assessment with substantive testing to provide reasonable assurance on financial statements.

The audit process includes: engagement planning and risk assessment, understanding internal controls, substantive audit procedures, analytical review, management representation, and audit report issuance. We use technology-enabled audit tools for data analytics, sampling, and documentation.

Our team is led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE) with experience across manufacturing, technology, financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors. We serve clients in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and across India.
